name: open-content-engine
description: A multi-agent brand content production system: a kit plus a thin runner, executed by an operator-supplied AI runtime.

scripts.lint: node --check bin/engine.js && node -e "const{execFileSync}=require('child_process'),fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');for(const d of['engine/cli','scripts'])for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d))if(f.endsWith('.js'))execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',p.join(d,f)])"
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm test && npm run fixture-run && npm run gate-regression && npm run validate-schemas && npm run hygiene
